text.value:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS dbo.city_difficulty;

CREATE TABLE dbo.city_difficulty AS

WITH initial_base AS (
    SELECT
        city_id,
        MAX(city_score) AS city_score,
        MAX(difficulty_level) AS difficulty_level
    FROM dbo.cities_selection_gold
    GROUP BY city_id
),

initial_norm AS (
    SELECT
        city_id,
        difficulty_level,
        1 - (
            (city_score - MIN(city_score) OVER ())
            / NULLIF(MAX(city_score) OVER () - MIN(city_score) OVER (), 0)
        ) AS difficulty_initial
    FROM initial_base
),

real_base AS (
    SELECT
        city_id,
        event_source,
        is_simulated,
        COUNT(*) AS nb_sessions,
        AVG(CAST(is_success AS FLOAT)) AS success_rate,
        AVG(CAST(nb_hints_shown AS FLOAT)) AS avg_hints_used,
        AVG(CAST(avg_response_time_sec AS FLOAT)) AS avg_response_time
    FROM dbo.fact_game_session
    GROUP BY
        city_id,
        event_source,
        is_simulated
),

real_prep AS (
    SELECT
        city_id,
        event_source,
        is_simulated,
        nb_sessions,
        1 - success_rate AS fail_rate,
        avg_hints_used,
        avg_response_time
    FROM real_base
),

real_norm AS (
    SELECT
        city_id,
        event_source,
        is_simulated,
        nb_sessions,
        (fail_rate - MIN(fail_rate) OVER ())
            / NULLIF(MAX(fail_rate) OVER () - MIN(fail_rate) OVER (), 0) AS fail_rate_norm,
        (avg_hints_used - MIN(avg_hints_used) OVER ())
            / NULLIF(MAX(avg_hints_used) OVER () - MIN(avg_hints_used) OVER (), 0) AS hints_norm,
        (avg_response_time - MIN(avg_response_time) OVER ())
            / NULLIF(MAX(avg_response_time) OVER () - MIN(avg_response_time) OVER (), 0) AS response_time_norm
    FROM real_prep
),

real_score AS (
    SELECT
        city_id,
        event_source,
        is_simulated,
        nb_sessions,
        0.4 * hints_norm
      + 0.3 * fail_rate_norm
      + 0.3 * response_time_norm AS difficulty_real
    FROM real_norm
)

SELECT
    i.city_id,
    COALESCE(r.nb_sessions, 0) AS nb_sessions,
    i.difficulty_level,
    i.difficulty_initial,
    r.difficulty_real,

CASE
    WHEN r.nb_sessions IS NULL
         OR r.nb_sessions < 3
    THEN i.difficulty_initial

    ELSE 0.3 * i.difficulty_initial
       + 0.7 * r.difficulty_real
END AS difficulty_score,

    r.event_source,
    r.is_simulated

FROM initial_norm i
LEFT JOIN real_score r
    ON i.city_id = r.city_id;

INSERT INTO dbo.city_difficulty_history (
    city_id,
    calculation_ts,
    calculation_date,
    calculation_date_key,
    difficulty_initial,
    difficulty_real,
    difficulty_score,
    nb_sessions,
    event_source,
    is_simulated
)
SELECT
    cd.city_id,
    CAST(SYSDATETIME() AS DATETIME2(6)) AS calculation_ts,
    CAST(SYSDATETIME() AS DATE) AS calculation_date,
    CAST(CONVERT(CHAR(8), CAST(SYSDATETIME() AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS calculation_date_key,
    cd.difficulty_initial,
    cd.difficulty_real,
    cd.difficulty_score,
    cd.nb_sessions,
    cd.event_source,
    cd.is_simulated
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        city_id,
        difficulty_initial,
        difficulty_real,
        difficulty_score,
        nb_sessions,
        event_source,
        is_simulated
    FROM dbo.city_difficulty
) cd
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.city_difficulty_history h
    WHERE h.city_id = cd.city_id
      AND h.calculation_date = CAST(SYSDATETIME() AS DATE)
      AND h.event_source = cd.event_source
      AND h.is_simulated = cd.is_simulated
);
